texto: People who actually have good advice seldom give it voluntarily, instead others seek them out for it. They do not shove it down people's throats just to boost their exaggerated sense of importance.
explicacao: Citação de JJ Matebesi sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “People who actually have good advice seldom give it voluntarily, instead others seek them out for…” articula reflexao, sabedoria, people em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
